hooks.command: cd "/Users/nishitkarwa/Documents/CITRA Website" && git fetch origin 2>/dev/null; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "Auto-sync: Claude changes [$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')]"; fi; if [ -n "$(git log origin/main..HEAD 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git pull origin main --rebase 2>/dev/null && git push origin main; fi
